prompt.content: I need an SVG of a adventurous pelican on a gray bicycle. Give the pelican beige feathers with a large gold-yellow beak and pouch. Include a simple ground line.
Create an SVG illustration of a pelican on a crimson bike.
Produce an SVG of a pelican happily biking on a blue bicycle. Show a sky and ground. Use a aqua background.
Write SVG markup showing a pelican riding a golden bike. Give the pelican sandy feathers with a large bright orange beak and pouch. Include fluffy clouds in the background. Use a retro art style.
Draw an SVG of a pelican pedaling a bicycle with a pink frame. The pelican should have golden feathers and an orange beak. Show a sky and ground.

Make an SVG: cheerful pelican riding a teal bicycle. Give the pelican white feathers with a large tangerine beak and pouch. The pelican leans back casually while pedaling. Include a simple ground line. Use a minimalist art style.

Make an SVG: proud pelican riding a purple bicycle. The pelican leans forward over the handlebars. Use a flat design art style. Use a peach background.
